name: EuiSwitch
description: Toggle switch for boolean on/off settings.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

showLabel.description: Whether to render the text label

label.description: Must be a string if `showLabel` prop is false

compressed.description: Compressed switches are smaller and contain no icon signifiers

labelProps.description: Object of props passed to the label's `<span />`

mini.description:
Mini styling is similar to compressed, but even smaller.
It's undocumented because it has very specific uses.
